title: The Phoenix
description: Adds ILLENIUM jerseys, music (replaces original music discs), and album covers (replaces original painting)
body:
![Covers of all ILLENIUM albums](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fe28398eb136c9a9d8f30d3cb65a5a5f622d966.png)

# Descrption
This mod basically replaces the vanilla music discs (6 of them) with the ILLENIUM albums (the newest one ODYSSEY still in develop), also replaces some paintings with the album covers. It adds some ILLENIUM jerseys as custom chestplate armour pieces. And it adds custom texts under the mainscreen Minecraft title.
![Music discs texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3389d59eeb63abdd60294df90a7f3adf59590b1.png)
# Jerseys
![All jerseys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5bf42df375af72da21a44aeec4d55e0a3758a8d_0.webp)
# Crafting Recipe
![Crafting recipe for the basic black jersey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c85b577e2adcecb751e7aa086840d16d39120d79.png)
![Crafting recipe for the basic white jersey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c4ea4953a09f620699d4755669ef798cbcd5da9.png)
![Crafting recipe for the fallen ember jersey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb0753bf097043675e8de9e198296e728e1b30e7.png)

Iron chestplate in the middle, and black/white wools surround it (for basic black / white)

## Bugs & Updates
This is a beta release so it may have bugs somewhere, I will try my best to fix it. New to Minecraft mod/resourcepack/datapack making, still trying to learn new things. And there will be unscheduled updates in the future. Hope you guys enjoy it!
